REPLY OF TO OPPOSITIONS AND CONDITIONAL NON-OPPOSITIONS AND TO MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTIONS 36(A) AND (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 15865619) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHLESINGER, NORMA

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-16-2007 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SPECIALLY SET A TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/3/07 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET IN DEPT. 220 WITH FURTHER NOTICE. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PARTIES STIPULATE E-SERVICE IS EQUIVALENT TO PERSONAL SERVICE. PATHOLOGY PROVIDED BY 9/21/07. VERIFICATION PROVIDED WITHIN 7 DAYS. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT WITHIN 30 DAYS, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE INFORMATION REGARDING PROPOSITION 51 WITNESSES AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES WITHIN 50 DAYS. IF DEFENDANTS LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI, CLERK: DLOK, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
